title: GitLab Pipeline
description: A GitLab CI/CD pipeline that runs automated jobs defined in a .gitlab-ci.yml configuration file.

id.description: The unique identifier of the pipeline.

iid.description: The project-scoped sequential ID of the pipeline.

project_id.description: The ID of the project the pipeline belongs to.

name.description: The user-defined name of the pipeline.

status.description: The current execution status of the pipeline.

source.description: The source that triggered the pipeline.

ref.description: The branch name, tag name, or commit SHA the pipeline runs on.

sha.description: The full SHA of the commit the pipeline runs on.

tag.description: Whether the pipeline was triggered by a tag push.

yaml_errors.description: YAML configuration validation errors, if any.

web_url.description: The URL to view the pipeline in a browser.

before_sha.description: The SHA of the commit before the pipeline was triggered.

duration.description: The total duration of the pipeline in seconds.

queued_duration.description: The time in seconds the pipeline spent in the queue before starting.

coverage.description: The code coverage percentage reported by the pipeline.

archived.description: Whether the pipeline has been archived.

created_at.description: The date and time the pipeline was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the pipeline was last updated.

started_at.description: The date and time the pipeline started execution.

finished_at.description: The date and time the pipeline finished execution.

committed_at.description: The date and time of the commit that triggered the pipeline.

UserSummary.description: A simplified representation of the GitLab user who triggered the pipeline.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

state.description: The current state of the user account.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

web_url.description: URL to the user's GitLab profile page.
